JAVA CODE:
```
    static long copy1(final Reader input, final Appendable output, final CharBuffer buffer)
            throws IOException {
        long count = 0;
        int n;
        while (EOF != (n = input.read(buffer))) {
            ((Buffer) buffer).flip();
            output.append(buffer, 0, n);
            count += n;
        }
        return count;
    }
```
